creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 248360
Install missing file

Install missing maxima-index-html.lisp file.

Fixes:

maxima --directories
;;; Loading #P"/usr/local/lib/ecl-21.2.1/sb-bsd-sockets.fas"
;;; Loading #P"/usr/local/lib/ecl-21.2.1/sockets.fas"
maxima-prefix=/usr/local
maxima-topdir=/usr/local/share/maxima/5.47.0
maxima-imagesdir=/usr/local/lib/maxima/5.47.0/binary-ecl
maxima-sharedir=/usr/local/share/maxima/5.47.0/share
maxima-srcdir=/usr/local/share/maxima/5.47.0/src
maxima-demodir=/usr/local/share/maxima/5.47.0/demo
maxima-testsdir=/usr/local/share/maxima/5.47.0/tests
maxima-docdir=/usr/local/share/maxima/5.47.0/doc
maxima-infodir=/usr/local/share/info
maxima-htmldir=/usr/local/share/maxima/5.47.0/doc/html
maxima-plotdir=/usr/local/libexec/maxima/5.47.0
maxima-layout-autotools=T
maxima-userdir=/home/nunotex/.maxima

maxima-lang-subdir=NIL
maxima-objdir=/home/nunotex/.maxima/binary/5_47_0/ecl/21_2_1
